_instructions.how_to_add_event: Copy one of the event objects below and paste it inside the 'events' array. Change the values to match your new event. The 'id' must be unique - use the date + short name, e.g. '2026-08-15-rapel'.
_instructions.spots: Leave as null if spots are unlimited or unknown
